title: Bridge Paper: Effective Connectivity of Functionally Anticorrelated Networks Under Lysergic Acid Diethylamide.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, depersonalization, nondual awareness.
**Phase context:** ego dissolution, self-loss, self-transcendence, depersonalization, default mode network, non-dual, nondual

Paper: Effective Connectivity of Functionally Anticorrelated Networks Under Lysergic Acid Diethylamide.
DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsych.2022.07.013
Abstract: BACKGROUND: Classic psychedelic-induced ego dissolution involves a shift in the sense of self and a blurring of the boundary between the self and the world. A similar phenomenon is identified in psychopathology and is associated with the balance of anticorrelated activity between the default mode network, which directs attention inward, and the salience network, which recruits the dorsal attention network to direct attention outward.
